chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1226 of 2017 C. P. No. D – 721 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.7842/2017 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 09-02-2021 Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Tariq Azam Larik, District Population Welfare Officer, Ghotki..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the Petitioners states that the Petitioners would be satisfied if a direction is given to the Respondents to decide their case for regularization strictly in accordance with law. Learned AAG undertakes that Petitioners’ case will be decided by the designated Committee for scrutiny of cases for regularization. Accordingly, the said Committee is directed to decide Petitioners’ case for regularization strictly in accordance with law and after providing opportunity of hearing to the Petitioners within a period of ninety days under compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court. Let a copy of this order be provided to learned Additional A.G Sindh for compliance. By consent, both these Petitions stand disposed of along with pending application(s) in the above terms. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected Petition. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
